relationship.description: Each Performance is scheduled at one Venue; a Venue can host many Performances
An Actor can have multiple Participation records (appearances in performances)
A Performance can involve many Participations (actors/roles)
A Role can be assigned to many Participation entries; each Participation references one Role (optional for generic cameo)

metadata.improvements_made: Added explicit foreign‑key attributes (performance_id, actor_id, role_id) to PARTICIPATION to make the associative entity fully functional. Enriched PARTICIPATION with status (enum: invited, confirmed, declined, cancelled), invitation_sent_at and response_at timestamps for invitation tracking. Kept the separate ROLE entity for flexibility while allowing it to be nullable when a role name is not needed. Declared email as a unique attribute for ACTOR. Included venue city/state already and retained seating_capacity. Documented cardinalities clearly and prepared for uniqueness constraints such as (performance_id, actor_id) in PARTICIPATION.
